extract: Sableye (Japanese: ヤミラミ Yamirami) is a dual-type Dark/Ghost Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Sableye can Mega Evolve into Mega Sableye using the Sablenite. Mega Sableye was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
